affected_pattern: A reversal posted but the original charge was not voided, leading to a net-neutral ledger but a doubled invoice amount
root_cause: Refund-without-void accounting bug — the CSR-initiated refund created an opposing entry rather than voiding the original, which the invoice-generator summed as two separate positive charges in the 'charges' column while netting to zero in the ledger.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Refund-Without-Void pattern
Invoice line items show original + reversal as two positive entries
Accounting ledger nets to zero but customer-visible invoice does not
recommended_action: Void the original charge and remove the opposing reversal from invoice view
Regenerate and resend affected invoices with apology communication
Change refund workflow to issue a void for same-cycle cancellations
Add invoice invariant: no two same-amount charges within 60 seconds
